name: Dakgalbi (Spicy Korean Chicken and Vegetables)
description: Maangchi's spicy stir-fried chicken with cabbage, sweet potato, and rice cakes in a gochugaru sauce — a communal Korean favorite.
recipeIngredient: 2 lb boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions: Combine the chicken with milk, 1 tbsp soy sauce, and black pepper; set aside to tenderize.
Mix the sauce: garlic, ginger, gochugaru, remaining soy sauce, rice syrup, a splash of water, and pepper.
In a large skillet, combine the chicken, vegetables, rice cakes, and sauce. Cook over medium-high, stirring, until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender, 12-15 minutes.
author: Maangchi
